steps.title: Convert percent increase to a multiplier
steps.content:
Each month customers increase by 5%. A 5% increase means the new amount is $1 + 0.05 = 1.05$ times the previous amount.
Each month we multiply by 1.05.

steps.title: Build the exponential formula
steps.content:
Starting with 800 customers in January 2018:
  • After 1 month ($m = 1$): $800(1.05)^1$
  • After 2 months ($m = 2$): $800(1.05)^2$
  • After $m$ months: $800(1.05)^m$
So the equation is $c = 800(1.05)^m$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
